name: HWR_RESUME
description: The resume table stores resume documents.

columns.Name: RESUME_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for the resume table.

columns.Name: ORIGINAL_ID
columns.Comments: This is the original ID of the resume from the source.

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for the social data source tables.

columns.Name: DOWNLOAD_DATE
columns.Comments: This is the download date of the resume document.

columns.Name: RESUME_TEXT
columns.Comments: This is the text version of the resume document.

columns.Name: RESUME
columns.Comments: This is the resume document in its original format.

columns.Name: MIME_TYPE
columns.Comments: This is the MIME type of the resume document.

columns.Name: RESUME_METADATA
columns.Comments: This is additional metadata extracted from the resume document.

columns.Name: CHECKSUM
columns.Comments: This is the checksum of the resume document.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
